= abi
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 5 directory (`third_party/gossamer/src/interface/abi/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n=== Source Files\n\n* `IPCDispatch.idr` — IPCDispatch configuration or data\n* `HandleLinearity.idr` — HandleLinearity configuration or data\n* `Types.idr` — Types configuration or data\n* `Groove.idr` — Groove configuration or data\n* `GrooveTermination.idr` — GrooveTermination configuration or data\n* `ResourceCleanup.idr` — ResourceCleanup configuration or data\n* `Foreign.idr` — Foreign configuration or data\n* `IPCIntegrity.idr` — IPCIntegrity configuration or data\n* `PanelIsolation.idr` — PanelIsolation configuration or data\n* `CapabilityAuthenticity.idr` — CapabilityAuthenticity configuration or data\n* `Layout.idr` — Layout configuration or data\n* `WindowStateMachine.idr` — WindowStateMachine configuration or data\n* `LayoutStability.idr` — LayoutStability configuration or data\n\n=== Other Files\n\n* `0.3-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` — A2ML machine-readable metadata\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Source files* implement core functionality.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n

== AI Manifest Structure

* `0.5-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` (this file) - Level 5 manifest for `third_party/gossamer/src/interface/abi/`
